recommendations.title: Big Wednesday
recommendations.overview: Three 1960s California surfers fool around, drift apart and reunite years later to ride epic waves.

recommendations.title: The Wind and the Lion
recommendations.overview: At the beginning of the 20th century an American woman is abducted in Morocco by Berbers, and the attempts to free her range from diplomatic pressure to military intervention.

recommendations.title: Red Dawn
recommendations.overview: It is the dawn of World War III. In mid-western America, a group of teenagers band together to defend their town—and their country—from invading Soviet forces.

recommendations.title: Conan the Barbarian
recommendations.overview: A horde of rampaging warriors massacre the parents of young Conan and enslave the young child for years on The Wheel of Pain. As the sole survivor of the childhood massacre, Conan is released from slavery and taught the ancient arts of fighting. Tran

recommendations.title: Flight of the Intruder
recommendations.overview: U.S. Navy pilot Lt. Jake Grafton and his bombardier buddy, Lt. Cmdr. Virgil Cole, are two soldiers embedded in the Vietnam War growing frustrated by the military's constraints on their missions. Despite the best efforts of their commanding officer, C

recommendations.title: Public Enemies
recommendations.overview: Depression-era bank robber John Dillinger's charm and audacity endear him to much of America's downtrodden public, but he's also a thorn in the side of J. Edgar Hoover and the fledgling FBI. Desperate to capture the elusive outlaw, Hoover makes Dilli

recommendations.title: The Boondock Saints
recommendations.overview: Tired of the crime overrunning the streets of Boston, Irish Catholic twin brothers Conner and Murphy are inspired by their faith to cleanse their hometown of evil with their own brand of zealous vigilante justice. As they hunt down and kill one notor

recommendations.title: Savage Streets
recommendations.overview: Brenda, vivacious leader of the "Satins", a fun-loving group of pretty high school girls, searches for deadly vengeance against the gang members who assaulted her deaf-mute sister.

recommendations.title: Straight from the Barrio
recommendations.overview: A young drug dealer falls in love while facing disruption among the men in his gang, and being offered a career as a Reggaetón singer.

recommendations.title: Angst
recommendations.overview: A killer is released from prison and breaks into a remote home to kill a woman, her handicapped son and her pretty daughter.
